mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM market_price_cache p INNER JOIN ( SELECT symbol, MAX(trade_date) AS max_date FROM market_price_cache WHERE symbol IN #{s} GROUP BY symbol ) latest ON p.symbol = latest.symbol AND p.trade_date = latest.max_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_price_cache (symbol, symbol_name, market, price, currency, cny_rate, cny_price, change_pct, trade_date, source, is_stale, fetched_at) VALUES (#{symbol}, #{symbolName}, #{market}, #{price}, #{currency}, #{cnyRate}, #{cnyPrice}, #{changePct}, #{tradeDate}, #{source}, #{isStale}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE symbol_name = VALUES(symbol_name), market = VALUES(market), price = VALUES(price), currency = VALUES(currency), cny_rate = VALUES(cny_rate), cny_price = VALUES(cny_price), change_pct = VALUES(change_pct), source = VALUES(source), is_stale = VALUES(is_stale), fetched_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE market_price_cache SET is_stale = 1 WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
